start.welcome: Welcome. I am Pulsar AI: a friendly professional agent for chart analysis, news impact, risk planning, and trading decisions.

algo.title: Algo Trading
algo.text:
Connection steps:
1. Put the attached AlgoTradingBot_v1.mq5 into MT5 > File > Open Data Folder > MQL5 > Experts.
2. Open it in MetaEditor and press Compile.
3. Test it in MT5 Strategy Tester on demo.
4. Drag the EA onto a demo chart and enable Algo Trading.
5. Risk hard cap: 5%. Do not rush live trading.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
